name: time table preview
script: frappe.ui.form.on('Custom Course Schedule', { refresh: function(frm) { render\_preview(frm); if (frm.doc.student\_group && frm.doc.academic\_term && frm.doc.weekly\_slots && frm.doc.weekly\_slots.length) { frm.add\_custom\_button('Generate Schedule for Term', function() { frappe.confirm( 'This will create Course Schedule records for the entire term. Continue?', function() { frappe.call({ method: 'generate\_course\_schedule', type: 'POST', args: { docname: frm.doc.name }, freeze: true, freeze\_message: 'Generating schedule...', callback: function(r) { if (r.message) { frappe.msgprint(r.message.count + ' schedule records created.'); } } }); } ); }); } }, weekly\_slots\_on\_form\_rendered: function(frm) { render\_preview(frm); } }); function render\_preview(frm) { if (!frm.doc.weekly\_slots || !frm.doc.weekly\_slots.length) { frm.set\_df\_property('timetable\_preview', 'options', '  No weekly slots added yet.  '); return; } var days = ['Monday', 'Tuesday', 'Wednesday', 'Thursday', 'Friday', 'Saturday']; var html = '  | Day | Time | Course | Room | | --- | --- | --- | --- | '; days.forEach(function(day) { var rows = frm.doc.weekly\_slots.filter(function(r) { return r.day\_of\_week === day; }); rows.sort(function(a, b) { return (a.from\_time || '').localeCompare(b.from\_time || ''); }); rows.forEach(function(r, idx) { html += '|'; if (idx === 0) { html += ' ' + day + ' |'; } html += ' ' + (r.from\_time || '') + ' - ' + (r.to\_time || '') + ' |'; html += ' ' + (r.course || '') + ' |'; html += ' ' + (r.room || '') + ' |'; html += ' '; }); }); html += ' '; frm.set\_df\_property('timetable\_preview', 'options', html); }
